title: Igenix IG3116 PowerSteam Lite Vertical Steam Iron, Ceramic Non-Stick Soleplate, 220 ml Water Tank Capacity, 1600 W, Self Cleaning, 1.9m Cord, Blue/White
features: POWERFUL VERTICAL STEAM FUNCTION: Effortlessly eliminate stubborn wrinkles and creases from clothing, curtains, or upholstery with the iron's powerful vertical steam function, ensuring a polished look for your fabrics.

EASY SPRAY FUNCTION: For those hard-to-remove creases that develop when clothes are left to dry for too long, the quick spray function comes to the rescue. Soften the fabric with a quick spray to make ironing a breeze.

SMOOTH GLIDING NON-STICK SOLEPLATE: Glide through your ironing tasks effortlessly with the non-stick Teflon ceramic soleplate. Its smooth surface ensures easy movement across garments, making your ironing pile seem like a walk in the park.

SELF-CLEANING FOR LONG-LASTING PERFORMANCE: Maintain your iron's performance and longevity with the built-in self-cleaning function, effectively removing impurities and scale to keep your iron in top-notch condition.

SPECIFICATIONS: With a powerful 1600W output and a generous 220ml tank capacity, experience continuous steam for smooth ironing sessions. The anti-calk feature prevents scale build-up, and the 1.9m cord length provides flexibility and convenience during use.
description: This Igenix Power Steam Lite steam iron offers a 1600W output with continuous steam for easier ironing. Functions include powerful bursts of steam to tackle any stubborn creases and a Teflon non-stick soleplate that will effortlessly glide over fabrics. It also has an adjustable temperature dial, is self-cleaning and has thermal cut out protection for safety and piece of mind. Product specification 1600W non-stick Teflon soleplate 220ml tank capacity powerful burst of steam vertical steam continuous steam variable steam self-cleaning anti-calk feature 1.9m cord length Product Dimensions (mm): H: 255.5 x W: 108.5 x D: 130

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎PowerSteam Lite, Vertical Steam Function, Spray Function, Self-Cleaning
